message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Confirm "Moved to Waiting For" copy already implemented">
Thanks Steve. Already implemented -- the announce text is "Moved to Waiting For" exactly as you suggested. You can verify in `src/routes/inbox.rs` line 241 and in the integration test `htmx_clarify_as_waiting_for_returns_empty_body_with_announce` which asserts the HX-Trigger contains "Moved to Waiting For".
</teammate-message>

content.text: Already verified and confirmed in my review. We're aligned. Waiting for the remaining team approvals to reach 9/9.
